dommeDisclaimer.title: Important: How Tips Work on Subm8
dommeDisclaimer.li1: Tips on Subm8 are voluntary gifts, not payments for services.
dommeDisclaimer.li2: You must not advertise or guarantee services in exchange for tips.
dommeDisclaimer.li3: If you offer services elsewhere, you are solely responsible for legal/tax compliance.
dommeDisclaimer.li4: Misuse may result in account suspension.
dommeDisclaimer.checkbox: I understand that tips on Subm8 are voluntary gifts and not tied to services.

paymentsPage.title: Payments & History
paymentsPage.guestNote: Please sign in to see your payment history.

bookmarksPage.title: Bookmarks
bookmarksPage.guestDesc: Add bookmarks to posts so you can easily find them again in the future.
bookmarksPage.emptyDesc: Save posts to revisit them here anytime.

monetizationPage.title: Monetization
monetizationPage.subtitle: How to earn on Subm8 – overview & best practices

walletRealtime.title: Wallet in real time
walletRealtime.text: Earnings land instantly in the Domme wallet and in your history.

flexibleSources.title: Flexible revenue streams
flexibleSources.text: Direct tips, pay-per-view, custom tributes & paid communities.

clearTransparent.title: Clear & transparent
clearTransparent.text: Clear rules for fees and payouts (SEPA, more to come).

methodCard.featureHint: Use this feature if it fits your audience – pricing and messaging are key.

tips.title: Direct tips (tributes)
bullets: Subs send any amount in chat or on your profile via the tip button.
Dommes receive the full amount.
The platform fee is paid by the sub.
Visible instantly in wallet & earnings history.
steps: Enable tips on your profile (if disabled).
Point to your tip button in chat.
Thank publicly – social proof boosts follow-up tips.

ppv.title: Pay-per-view (optional)
bullets: Premium content (e.g., NSFW media) is visible only after a micropayment.
Ideal for high chat volume or exclusive drops.
Fine-grained pricing (e.g., per image/clip).
steps: Set a fair price and tease the content.
Use Story/Feed/Chat to drive traffic to PPV.

customTributes.title: Custom tributes (drainer / tribute timer)
bullets: Subs set up recurring payments (e.g., €5 daily, €20 weekly).
Runs automatically until stopped – full control on the sub’s side.
Dommes can actively “request” such drainers.
steps: Track runtimes and renew proactively before expiry.

paidCommunities.title: Community contributions (paid communities)
bullets: Create a community with paid access.
Subs pay monthly or one-time to join.
Exclusivity + group dynamics = higher lifetime value.
steps: Define clear value (e.g., weekly drops, live Q&A, voting).
Set a price and limit slots for scarcity.
Promote invites on your profile & in chat.

payouts.title: Payouts
bullets: All earnings collect in the Domme wallet (export available for accounting).
Payout via SEPA/bank transfer (later: PayPal, crypto).
Clear overview in “Earnings & history”.
steps: Start a payout from your wallet.
Download CSV/export for accounting if needed.
payouts.note: Note: Available payout options may vary by region.

leaderboardBadges.title: Leaderboard & badges (gamification)
bullets: High-earning dommes are listed prominently.
Badges & milestones increase social proof.
More visibility → more sub motivation → more revenue.
steps: Show badges on your profile & in communities.

fees.title: Fees — at a glance
bullets: Direct tips: the domme receives the full amount; the platform fee is covered by the sub.
Other features (PPV, communities, etc.) may have their own fee models. Details are shown in each flow.
Payouts: documented transparently in your wallet.

profileSettings.dangerZoneDesc: Deactivation locks your profile and ends your sessions.

securityPage.title: Security & access
securityPage.notSignedInMessage: Please sign in to manage security options.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.intro: Protect your account with a second sign-in step. You can use an app (TOTP), SMS (if a phone number is on file) or, later, security keys/passkeys.
twofa.scanIntro: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app and then enter the 6-digit code.
twofa.smsNote: Available when a phone number is on file and SMS delivery is configured.

extraPassword.title: Additional password protection
extraPassword.desc: When resetting the password, email or phone number must also be confirmed.

sessions.title: End sessions
sessions.desc: Ends all active sessions on all devices and signs you out here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.notSignedInIntro: This page manages your push, email and filter settings.

push.title: Push notifications
push.note: Controls all push notifications on your device.

email.title: Email
email.note: We send rarely and with focus. You can unsubscribe anytime.

filters.title: Mute notifications from people
filters.noAvatar: ... who have a default profile photo
filters.phoneUnverified: ... whose phone number is not verified
filters.note: These filters only affect unknown people. Contacts/followings are unaffected.

content.p_scope: These Terms apply to the use of the Subm8 platform (“platform”, “we”) by registered users (“you”). By registering, you agree to these Terms.
content.audience_li_2: Content may include NSFW / adult content.
content.audience_li_3: We reserve the right to request identity or age verification.
content.p_roles: Subm8 enables interactions between Dommes and Subs.
content.roles_li_1: Only upload content you own rights to.
content.roles_li_3: Prohibited: glorification of violence, non-consensual content, minors, discrimination.
content.payments_li_1: Dommes can receive payments (tips, memberships, communities).
content.payments_li_2: Subm8 charges a platform fee plus possible provider fees.
content.payments_li_3: Payouts above a minimum threshold (shown in dashboard).
content.payments_li_4: No liability for chargebacks or external payment issues.
content.termination_li_1: You can delete your account at any time.
content.termination_li_2: We may suspend accounts or remove content when laws or these Terms are violated.
content.liability_li_1: We are not liable for user behavior.
content.p_changes: We may adjust these Terms. We will inform you in time about material changes.
content.callout_body: Supplementary documents: Privacy Policy, Imprint, Community Guidelines, Refund Policy, Age Verification.

content.p_scope: These Terms apply to the use of the Subm8 platform by registered users. By registering, you agree to these Terms.
content.audience_li_1: Use is strictly 18+; we may require age/ID verification.
content.audience_li_2: NSFW/adult content may appear. Minors and non-consensual content are prohibited.
content.p_roles: Subm8 enables interactions between Dommes and Subs.
content.roles_li_1: You own the rights to your content and do not violate laws or third-party rights.
content.roles_li_2: Prohibited: non-consensual depictions, minors, glorified violence, hate/discrimination.
content.roles_li_3: We may moderate, restrict or remove content to enforce laws and these Terms.
content.tips_li_1: Voluntary gifts: tips are voluntary transfers between users.
content.tips_li_2: Not a service fee: tips are not payment for goods/services and do not entitle you to specific content, replies or actions.
content.tips_li_3: Platform role: Subm8 only intermediates the transfer and does not determine how recipients use tips.
content.tips_li_4: Finality: once confirmed, gifts are generally final and non-refundable (except where required by law or clear technical error; see Refund Policy).
content.tips_li_5: Services ≠ gifts: separately agreed services (e.g., coaching, custom content) are not “gifts”. Taxes/consumer rules may apply (your responsibility).
content.fees_li_1: Subm8 charges a platform fee (e.g., 10%) plus possible provider fees.
content.fees_li_2: For gifts, a payer surcharge may be shown (“on top”). The “amount to creator” is the base credited amount.
content.fees_li_3: Payouts above a minimum and after internal checks (risk/compliance).
content.fees_li_4: Chargebacks/fraud: we may temporarily suspend accounts and withhold amounts until clarified.
content.tax_li_1: You are responsible for taxes (e.g., income tax, VAT if applicable) in your jurisdiction.
content.tax_li_2: Subm8 is not a party to services separately agreed between users.
content.tax_li_3: Where legally required, Subm8 will report/withhold.
content.termination_li_1: You can delete your account anytime (subject to legal retention).
content.termination_li_2: We may suspend/remove accounts and delay/deny payouts if laws, these Terms or safety policies are breached.
content.liability_li_1: No liability for third-party behavior (other users, payment providers).
content.liability_li_2: Platform provided “as is”; use at your own risk as permitted by law.
content.p_changes: We may update these Terms; we’ll notify you about material changes within the app/web.
content.p_law: Governing law is the operator’s country (see Imprint), excluding conflict rules, unless mandatory consumer law dictates otherwise.
content.callout_body: Gifts are voluntary, non-refundable and not tied to services. Subm8 only intermediates. You’re responsible for separately agreed services (incl. taxes).

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: Rules for refunds on gifts, memberships and errors.

content.gifts_li_1: Gifts are voluntary transfers between users and are generally final (non-refundable).
content.gifts_li_2: Exceptions: legally required refunds, clear technical error (e.g., double charge) or verified fraud.
content.subs_li_1: Subscriptions can be canceled anytime, effective at the next billing date.
content.subs_li_2: Amounts already paid for current periods are not prorated unless required by law.
content.p_tech: For double charges or misposts, we refund after review. Contact us within 14 days with transaction ID and evidence.
content.p_chargebacks: For chargebacks/fraud, we may temporarily suspend the account and withhold payouts until clarified. Abusive chargebacks may lead to suspension.
content.process_li_2: We review within a reasonable time and inform you of the outcome and refund channel if applicable.
content.process_li_3: Refunds are issued via the original payment method.
content.callout_body: Payment provider T&Cs also apply (provider fees, timelines, checks). Subm8 intermediates payments and does not sell services itself.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy (GDPR)
privacy.subtitle: How we process data — transparent and purpose-bound.

content.p_controller: Subm8 (Operator: [Your Name / Company], [Address], [Email]) is responsible for processing personal data on this platform.
content.data_li_2: Profile data (avatar, banner, bio, community memberships)
content.data_li_3: Payment data (tips, subscriptions, wallet balances, payouts)
content.data_li_4: Usage data (logins, feed interactions, message metadata)
content.sharing_li_1: Payment service providers (e.g., Stripe, PayPal or other PSPs)
content.sharing_li_3: No disclosure to third parties for advertising
content.p_retention: We store data while your account is active. After deletion: erase or anonymize unless legal retention applies.
content.rights_li_3: Right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority
content.p_cookies: Subm8 uses necessary cookies for login and security. Analytics, if any, is anonymized/pseudonymized.
content.callout_body: We list providers and storage locations in the technical docs and in the dashboard (“Legal & Privacy”).

content.adult_note: Note: This platform is exclusively for adults. Content may be NSFW/adult.

guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.subtitle: Respect, consent and safety first.

list.li_1: 18+ only — no minors, no content involving minors.
list.li_3: Be respectful — no hate speech, discrimination or bullying.
list.li_4: NSFW content — allowed but correctly labeled (e.g., NSFW flag).
list.li_5: Privacy — no sharing personal data without consent.
list.li_6: Spam & ads — prohibited unless clearly labeled and compliant.
list.li_7: Report abuse — repeated violations lead to action.

guidelines.callout_body: Use the report function for boundary violations. Our team reviews promptly and proportionately.

content.p_access: Using Subm8 is allowed only for adults. By registering, you confirm you are at least 18.
content.proof_li_1: We may require verification (e.g., ID upload or external provider).
content.proof_li_2: Without successful verification, access to certain features may be limited.
content.protection_li_1: False age claims lead to immediate suspension.
content.protection_li_2: Any content involving minors is strictly prohibited and will be reported and removed.
content.callout_body: Violations of youth-protection rules are enforced — including reports to authorities where required.
